name: Contingency Stack
description: Stacked list of small associate-level sponsors. The row of tiny logos/text names along the rocker panel, rear quarter, or around the wheel arches. Contingency decals are required-size per racing series — keep them legible but compact, stacked vertically or inline horizontally.

template.text:
SPONSOR A
SPONSOR B
SPONSOR C
SPONSOR D

overrides.text: SPONSOR A  •  SPONSOR B  •  SPONSOR C  •  SPONSOR D

notes: Contingency text is the smallest legible text on the car — anti-aliasing matters. Avoid italic at this size (it fuzzes at TV distance). Keep line_height at 1.3-1.5 for stacked lists so sponsors don't visually bleed together. Most real-world contingency decals are 2-3 inches tall on the physical car; translate to ~18-28px in SPB's canvas space.
